generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox measuring angular position for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position data from motor encoder for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data derived from angular position for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from motor current for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for simulating joint friction in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for simulating joint friction in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for simulating joint friction in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for simulating joint friction in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of joint friction models in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data integration of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical sensors to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement via model-based control for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction analysis for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisVisualization
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on joint friction used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionAnalysisVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction analysis data"
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis environment for machining applications"
    base:contains RobotFirstAxis, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming with MQTT, though specific update frequency is not documented."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating data traces, engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), processing components for data calculation, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) to link sensor data with system behavior."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), using live sensor data during robot operation for friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data against measured data to detect friction loss deviations, with models refined based on discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling standards."
]
